title: Pixelmon Factory
description: Pixelmon Factory is a mod that bridges Pixelmon X Create together. This was inspired by Create: Pixelfactory.
body:
IS THIS MOD STILL GETTING SUPPORT: Currently, yes. I will add more information about what versions later on.

Pixelmon Factory is an evolving mod focused on integrating the Create and Pixelmon experiences to expand crafting and automation for Pokémon items. Currently, the mod introduces a range of custom crafting recipes, fluids, and item enhancements to support a unique Pixelmon crafting workflow. As it's still in early development, the mod lacks substantial planned content, and many features are still being refined. Player feedback is appreciated to help shape future updates and expand the mod's functionality.

All assets that have been used are retextures or made by me.

If you have ANY suggestions of features you would like to see in the mod please let me know by joining the discord on this page.



Permissions & Licences:

Create Wrench: From [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create) (If the owners of Create would like me to remove it, then please message me.)

Pokeball: From [IconDuck](https://iconduck.com/icons/315706/pokeball)

More description will be added later.
